/usr/bin/g++-11 -fPIC  -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Wno-deprecated-copy -Wno-int-in-bool-context -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libpmp.so.3.0.0 -o ../../libpmp.so.3.0.0 CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/surface_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/curvature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/decimation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/differential_geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/distance_point_triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/fairing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/features.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/geodesics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/hole_filling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/laplace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/normals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/numerics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/parameterization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/remeshing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/remeshing_cuda.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/remeshing_cuda_checkpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/shapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/smoothing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/subdivision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/triangulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/gpu_bvh.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/gpu_trimesh.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/remesh_collapse.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/remesh_flip.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/remesh_smooth.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/remesh_smooth_host.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/algorithms/cuda/remesh_split.cu.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/read_obj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/read_off.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/read_pmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/read_stl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/write_obj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/write_off.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/write_pmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/io/write_stl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmp.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-13/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-13/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib: /usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
